server_url.title: Server URL
server_url.description: Base URL the MCP client connects to. Keep the default http://localhost:40010 when Claude Code runs on the same machine as the unraid-rmcp server. Change to e.g. http://nas:40010 or https://unraid.example.com when connecting to a remote instance. Do NOT append /mcp — the plugin adds it.

api_token.title: API token
api_token.description: Bearer token for MCP HTTP authentication (Authorization: Bearer <token>). Must match UNRAID_RMCP_TOKEN on the server. Generate one with: openssl rand -hex 32

no_auth.title: Disable service auth
no_auth.description: Run unraid-rmcp without MCP auth. Use only when an upstream gateway enforces auth before traffic reaches this service.

auth_mode.title: Auth mode
auth_mode.description: Server auth mode. bearer: static API token only. oauth: Google OAuth/JWT for clients like Codex while the API token remains accepted for this plugin connection. OAuth requires public_url, google_client_id, google_client_secret, and auth_admin_email.

public_url.title: Public URL
public_url.description: Public base URL for OAuth issuer metadata, e.g. https://unraid.example.com. Required when auth_mode=oauth.

google_client_id.title: Google OAuth client ID
google_client_id.description: Google OAuth client ID for auth_mode=oauth. Create a Web application client at https://console.cloud.google.com.

google_client_secret.title: Google OAuth client secret
google_client_secret.description: Google OAuth client secret for auth_mode=oauth.

auth_admin_email.title: OAuth admin email
auth_admin_email.description: Bootstrap allowed Google account for OAuth mode. The server refuses to start OAuth without an allowlisted account.

use_docker.title: Deploy with Docker
use_docker.description: Deployment method. true: run via the bundled docker compose stack (ports 40010, mounts data_dir). false: run as a systemd user service (lighter weight, logs to journald).

data_dir.title: Data directory
data_dir.description: Directory for runtime state (OAuth DB, JWT key). Defaults to the plugin persistent data directory.

unraid_api_url.title: Unraid API URL
unraid_api_url.description: Full Unraid GraphQL endpoint URL. Example: https://10-1-0-2.<hash>.myunraid.net:31337/graphql

unraid_api_key.title: Unraid API key
unraid_api_key.description: API key for the Unraid GraphQL endpoint (x-api-key header). Generate in Unraid UI: Settings → Management Access → API Keys.

unraid_skip_tls.title: Skip TLS verification
unraid_skip_tls.description: Accept self-signed TLS certificates from the Unraid GraphQL endpoint. Set true when the server uses a self-signed certificate.
